holdings.infoBox: RKSG is an equity ETF with a total of 244 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 12.74%, Apple at 8.87%, Alphabet at 8.51%, Microsoft at 4.10%, and Eli Lilly and Company at 3.14%.

overview.description: The Ruk Strategic Growth ETF (RKSG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Ruk Strategic Growth index. The fund tracks a rules-based index of US large-cap equities designed to deliver growth-oriented exposure. The strategy emphasizes companies with strong growth characteristics while incorporating valuation and risk controls. RKSG was launched on Apr 6, 2026 and is issued by Ruk.
